security_bugs.description: The `_install_managed` function uses `shutil.copy2` and then manually modifies permissions using `dst.chmod`. While it attempts to preserve execution bits, it doesn't check the ownership or secure the files against symlink attacks during the copy process.
security_bugs.fix: Use a more robust file synchronization method that verifies path safety (preventing TOCTOU) or use a dedicated deployment tool if complexity increases.

security_bugs.description: The `_fix_mcp` function executes `claude mcp add burnless`. If the environment variables or shell configuration are compromised, this could lead to arbitrary command execution via path injection.
security_bugs.fix: Use absolute paths for the 'claude' executable and validate input if any were passed.

performance_refactors.description: The `run_checks` function calls `_collect` twice when `fix=True`. This results in redundant filesystem checks and subprocess executions.
performance_refactors.proposal: Modify `_apply_fixes` to update the status of the existing `checks` list objects in-place instead of re-running the full collection.

design_smell.description: The function `_check_c` is becoming a 'God Function' for Claude Code wiring, handling multiple distinct logical concerns (settings exists, settings parse, hooks wired, managed files check).
design_smell.impact: Harder to unit test individual check logics and maintain as more wiring types are added.
